current_judgment: Capability implemented and contract-backed (analyze.style.scene.v1). Route, normalization, and 25 unit tests exist. No governed evaluation runs have been executed. Metrics are placeholders. Adoption posture is experimental_only until a structured evaluation set and judgment session are completed.
next_required_decision: Define an evaluation input set (5-10 scene samples with known style characteristics). Run the capability against the set and record structured judgments. Produce a calibration doc and promote status to evaluating.
provenance_notes: No evaluation runs have been executed. All metric values are 0.0 placeholders — they do not represent measured performance. metric_profile is set to detection_reasoning as the closest available value; style analysis identifies issues and reasons about them but is not a binary detection task. A dedicated metric_profile value for structured analysis output (e.g. structured_analysis) should be added to the schema when the analysis capability family is formally registered.
